reviews.name: Ryan Carter
reviews.title: USA
reviews.text: Been lifting 12 years. Half scoop before deadlifts and my CNS just switched on. Energy curve is smooth and aggression stays controlled through every set.

reviews.name: Arjun Mehta
reviews.des: Most pre workouts in India feel watered down. This one is different. Took half scoop before squat day and the focus was unreal.

reviews.name: Daniel Kovacs
reviews.des: As a powerlifting coach I’m careful with stimulants. Surprisingly this formula gives clean activation without the jittery overload most high-stim products have.

reviews.des: Finally a pre workout that actually respects high stim users. The energy stays locked even during heavy compound sessions.

reviews.name: Sandeep Rawat
reviews.des: Within 20 minutes the switch flipped. Bench session felt aggressive and focused. Didn’t feel that ugly caffeine crash afterwards.
